title: Andrew Yang thinks the next big startup opportunity is lowering the cost of living
summary: Andrew Yang identifies housing, food, and wireless service as areas where Americans overpay and sees startup opportunities in reducing consumer costs. This reflects growing concerns about cost-of-living pressures affecting consumer spending and economic opportunity.
content: Andrew Yang made a list of everything Americans overpay for — housing, food, wireless — and thinks the next startup gold rush is giving that money back.

zh.title: 安德鲁·杨认为下一个大创业机会是降低生活成本
zh.summary: 安德鲁·杨指出住房、食品和无线服务是美国人支付过高的领域，并看到了降低消费者成本的创业机会。这反映了人们对生活成本压力影响消费支出和经济机会的日益关注。

title: Anthropic shuts down Fable, Mythos models following Trump admin directive
summary: Anthropic has discontinued its Fable and Mythos AI models following a Trump administration Commerce Department directive citing national security concerns over a potential 'jailbreak' vulnerability. The action marks government intervention in commercial AI product availability.
content: Commerce dept. worries that a Fable 5 "jailbreak" could be a national security threat.

zh.title: Anthropic根据特朗普政府指令关闭Fable和Mythos模型
zh.summary: Anthropic因应特朗普政府商务部的指令，以国家安全问题为由停止了其Fable和Mythos AI模型，理由是存在潜在的"越狱"漏洞。这一举动标志着政府对商业AI产品可用性的干预。

title: Anthropic’s safety warnings may have just backfired — the government has pulled the plug on its most powerful AI
summary: The Trump administration ordered the recall of Anthropic's most powerful AI model based on a narrow potential jailbreak vulnerability, prompting the company to dispute the decision and argue the concern doesn't justify withdrawing a widely-deployed product. The dispute highlights tensions between government oversight and commercial AI development.
content: Anthropic isn't hiding its frustration. "We disagree that the finding of a narrow potential jailbreak should be cause for recalling a commercial model deployed to hundreds of millions of people," the company wrote in a blog post.

zh.title: Anthropic的安全警告可能适得其反——政府关闭了其最强大的AI
zh.summary: 特朗普政府因一个狭隘的潜在越狱漏洞下令召回Anthropic最强大的AI模型，促使该公司对该决定提出异议，并辩称这一顾虑不足以证明撤回广泛部署的产品的合理性。这一争议突显了政府监督与商业AI开发之间的紧张关系。

title: Valve just imported 13 tons of VR headsets in one day
summary: Valve received approximately 13 tons of Virtual Reality Devices in a June 10th shipment, likely representing the first mass production units of its new Steam Frame gaming headset. The large-scale import signals Valve's significant entry into the consumer VR hardware market.
content:
On June 10th, the German container ship Posen docked in Los Angeles after a two-week voyage from Shanghai. As Valve watcher Brad Lynch notes, it was almost certainly carrying the first mass production shipments of the Steam Frame, Valve's new gaming headset. 
Import records show that Valve's distribution partner Ceva offloaded nearly 32 metric tons of "Virtual Reality Devices" on Valve's behalf - or roughly 13 tons of actual product, after you subtract the roughly 3,700 kilogram weight of five 40-foot shipping containers. 
That's the same math we used to estimate that Valve imported 50 tons of game consoles in two days last month - and sin …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Valve 一天内进口了13吨VR头显
zh.summary: Valve在6月10日的一批货物中收到了约13吨虚拟现实设备，可能代表其新型Steam Frame游戏头显的首批大规模生产单位。这次大规模进口标志着Valve正在大举进入消费级VR硬件市场。
